channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Brazilian court convicts Eduardo Bolsonaro of courting US interference
item.description: US placed tariffs on Brazilian goods and sanctioned judicial officials involved in trial of the father for coup plot.

item.title: US sprinter Noah Lyles sets world best 150m time at Golden Spike meet
item.description: Lyles clocks 14.67 seconds, edges Dambile of South Africa for gold while Australian teenager Gout Gout finishes third.

item.title: Somaliland president visits Israeli Knesset on tour
item.description: Somaliland’s President is on a ‘historic’ tour of Israel, where he’s opened an embassy and visited the Knesset.

item.title: Ghana’s Partey loses appeal to overturn Canadian visa refusal for World Cup
item.description: Thomas Partey will not be able to enter Canada for Ghana's first World Cup match against Panama on Wednesday.

item.title: Mbappe breaks scoring record in France win over Senegal in World Cup
item.description: Kylian Mbappe becomes France's all-time top scorer with 58 goals, two goals off record World Cup scorer Miroslav Klose.

item.title: LIVE: Argentina vs Algeria – World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow our live updates, with full team news coverage, ahead of our text commentary stream service.

item.title: South Korea World Cup squad at odds with media over Son Heung-min mockery
item.description: South Korean players reportedly refrain from speaking to national media outside official World Cup commitments.

item.title: Palestinian Bedouin villagers demolish homes after Israeli orders
item.description: Palestinian Bedouins in Beersheba are demolishing their own homes after Israel issued demolition orders.

item.title: US Justice Department accuses 15 Minnesota activists of ‘antifa’ activities
item.description: Prosecutors have accused the activists of seeking 'to interfere with lawful immigration enforcement operations'.

item.title: Returning to destruction in south Lebanon
item.description: Many Lebanese are returning to their homes in the south to face the destruction that upended their livelihoods.

item.title: Iran, Ukraine dominate G7 summit
item.description: Here’s what came out of the G7 summit in France.

item.title: Iranian fans honour Minab victims at World Cup match
item.description: Iranian fans turned their World Cup match against New Zealand into a moment of remembrance, raising ‘Minab 168’ banners.

item.title: Africa’s chances at the World Cup
item.description: From Cape Verde’s debut to Ghana’s quarter-final legacy, six teams from sub-Saharan Africa to watch at the World Cup.

item.title: Ebola outbreak in DR Congo could become worst in history, Africa CDC warns
item.description: The ⁠number of confirmed cases in ⁠the country has ​increased to 837, including 196 deaths.

item.title: US judge upholds conviction of ex-judge who helped man evade federal agents
item.description: Activists say former judge Hannah Dugan was targeted by the Trump administration for defiance over immigration raids.

item.title: What has Iran won and lost from this war?
item.description: Iran's relationship with its Gulf neighbours, which it attacked during the war, has been damaged.

item.title: ‘I know what you’ve been through’: FIFA president visits Iran team
item.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino praised Iran’s players during a World Cup dressing room visit after the team’s 2-2 draw.

item.title: Ohio Governor Mike DeWine opposes death penalty, reversing past support
item.description: Support for capital punishment has steadily declined in the United States, with several states rolling back its use.

item.title: Repairs begin at 1,000-year-old Kyiv monastery after Russian attack
item.description: The Kyiv Pechersk Lavra is under repair after deadly Russian attacks on the Ukrainian capital on Monday.

item.title: Israeli strikes kill four in southern Lebanon amid ceasefire talks
item.description: Drone attacks target vehicles in Nabatieh amid fragile ceasefire negotiations between Iran and the US.

item.title: Robinhood slashes workforce by 10 percent amid restructuring
item.description: CEO Vlad Tenev said while the firm is in a strong financial position, it has been a ‘heavily-layered organization'.

item.title: Israel seizes power over occupied West Bank mosque from Palestinians
item.description: Hebron's mayor warns unilateral changes breach agreements, posing significant consequences for the region's stability.

item.title: Ronaldo’s last dance as Portugal face DR Congo in World Cup: All to know
item.description: Team news, prediction, and lineups as Cristiano Ronaldo’s Portugal begin quest for maiden Cup trophy against DR Congo.

item.title: Trump slams Israeli attacks on Lebanon at G7 summit
item.description: US President Donald Trump slammed Israeli attacks on Lebanon at the G7 Summit.

item.title: Qatar renews mediation efforts for regional stability after US-Iran deal
item.description: Qatar says it is working to prevent a return to war, following the signing of the MoU between the US and Iran.
